PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED MAR-27-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHELLI, NANCY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2011 - PARTIES PRESENT, MATTER WAS HEARD, ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBIT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEMOS, STEPHANIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SANCHELLI, NANCY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
